metadata.title: AI Tool Picker - Find the Best AI Tool for You
metadata.description: Tell me what you want to do, and I will recommend the best AI tools.

home.title: Let me pick AI for you
home.subtitle: Tell me what you want to do and I will recommend the most suitable AI tools
home.heroHint: Describe your goal in one sentence and we will return 3-6 practical picks.
home.searchPlaceholder: Describe your needs, e.g. I want to make a PPT
home.searchHelper: We’ll return the best-matching AI tools with brief use-case notes.
home.examples: Input examples: "I need a pitch deck for fundraising" or "Help me draft short video scripts." Expected result: tools by scenario with why they fit and official links.

sampleQueries.pitchDeck: Create a product pitch deck PPT

onboarding.title: Welcome to AI Tool Picker
onboarding.subtitle: Learn the best way to ask in 30 seconds and get quality picks immediately.
onboarding.inputWay: How to input: describe your goal in one sentence, e.g. “I need a fundraising pitch deck.”
onboarding.useCases: Use cases: writing, coding, design, video creation, data analysis, translation, and more.
onboarding.outputFormat: Result format: 3-6 tools with fit reasons, scenario tags, and official links.
onboarding.highQualityExample: I need a 10-slide English pitch deck for a cross-border e-commerce brand, plus speaker notes

history.title: Search history
history.empty: No history yet, try entering a need

home.loading: Finding the best tools for you...
home.emptyHint: Try: make PPT, write copy, draw, write code...

preferences.title: Recommendation preferences
preferences.subtitle: Preferences and recent history are both used for ranking
preferences.recommendationsSubtitle: Showing 3 items for now. You can reset or adjust anytime.

privacy.local: Privacy notice: preferences and history stay in local browser storage and are not auto-synced.
privacy.account: Privacy notice: preferences stay local; favorites and behavior events are synced to your account for recommendations.

favorites.title: My Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Only visible to you, saved for later
favorites.limit: You can favorite up to {limit} tools

compare.limit: You can compare up to {limit} tools
compare.title: Tool compare ({current}/{max})
compare.selectedOne: 1 tool selected, pick one more to start comparing
compare.needMore: Select at least 1 more tool to start comparing

placeholder.favoriteDesc: This area will show favorite count and trend in a future release.
placeholder.reviewDesc: This area will show ratings, review summary, and representative feedback.

errors.requestFailed: Request failed, please try again later
errors.fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
